subcodes.first_line: O pure leaf! By the light of guidance thou art illumined, and from the Kawthar of eternity thou hast quaffed. Hold fast to the hem of the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه زکیه بنور هدی مهتدی شدی و از کوثر بقا آشامیدی دست بدامان جمال رحمن
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
